event_description: Initial execution of the malicious process masquerading as a legitimate Adobe application (reader_sl.exe).
Process hollowing of explorer.exe by the malicious reader_sl.exe process to hide activity.
Creation of mutex '746bbf3569adEncrypt' to manage malicious cryptographic activity.
Establishment of C2 communication channels to malicious infrastructure and potential use of wuauclt.exe for network activity.
Web injection into explorer.exe to facilitate credential theft from banking pages.
